hero.headline: Your tools and AI conversations—finally in one connected place.
hero.subhead: IntegrateWise captures your scattered work data and AI chats, organizes them into your Spine, and gives you an IQ Hub where your IQ Clone works one step ahead—turning conversations into clarity, tasks, and outcomes.
hero.trustLine: No heavy setup. Start in minutes. Add integrations when you're ready.

problem.headline: Work is scattered. AI chats get lost. Context disappears.
problem.description: You're using multiple tools, switching tabs all day, and having valuable AI conversations—then losing the outputs the moment the chat ends.
points: Tool data is spread across apps
AI conversations don't become reusable knowledge
Decisions are not captured as a system
You rebuild the same context again and again
problem.solution: IntegrateWise fixes that with a simple workflow: load → store → think.

solution.headline: One workflow that makes everything stay connected.

pillars.title: One-Click Loader
pillars.description: Bring in your tool data in seconds—without complex setup.
points: Import or connect sources quickly
Extract key entities, tasks, and highlights
Start getting value immediately

pillars.title: Spine
pillars.description: Your central source of truth—where everything stays organized and connected.
points: Store data + conversations in one place
Keep context linked across accounts, projects, tasks, and notes
Search across everything instantly

pillars.title: Your IQ Hub
pillars.description: A personal thinking space where AI conversations turn into usable work.
points: Capture and organize your AI thinking
Convert chats into structured notes, tasks, and decisions
Reuse insights anytime—without re-prompting

iqClone.headline: Meet your IQ Clone—your better self, working one step ahead.
iqClone.description: Your IQ Clone doesn't just "assist." It prepares, drafts, summarizes, and connects the dots before you even ask.
points: Turns AI conversations into action plans
Surfaces next steps and missing context
Keeps your thinking consistent across weeks and projects
Learns your operating style inside your workspace

howItWorks.title: Load
howItWorks.desc: Use One-Click Loader to pull in your work context (files, tools, conversations).

howItWorks.title: Store
howItWorks.desc: Everything gets organized into the Spine, with links back to sources.

howItWorks.title: Think
howItWorks.desc: Use your IQ Hub to refine, decide, and execute—powered by your IQ Clone.

outcomes.headline: What you get immediately
points: One place for your tool data + AI conversations
Searchable memory for everything you've worked on
Cleaner decisions and faster execution
Less repeated context, fewer dropped tasks
A system that compounds over time

lenses.title: Business OS
lenses.description: Run your business in one workspace—CRM, website, marketing, sales, delivery, and knowledge.

lenses.title: Customer Success (TAM Lens)
lenses.description: Track real customer outcomes with technical depth—health score, adoption, usage, renewals, and strategy.

lenses.title: Personal / Team Workspace
lenses.description: Capture your conversations and work context—tasks, notes, thinking, and decisions—without losing anything.

integrations.headline: Connect what you already use (when you're ready)
integrations.description: Start without integrations, then connect tools for deeper automation and insights.

security.headline: Your data stays yours
points: You control what connects and what loads
Clear permissions and visibility
Delete/export anytime

faq.q: Is this another tool I have to maintain?
faq.a: No. IntegrateWise is designed to reduce tools—not add overhead.

faq.q: Do I need integrations to start?
faq.a: No. Start with One-Click Loader and add integrations later.

faq.q: What makes this different from generic "AI assistants"?
faq.a: IntegrateWise stores everything in your Spine and turns conversations into reusable work inside your IQ Hub—powered by your IQ Clone.
